src_raw: 2022年伊始，全球經濟環境一片暗淡。新冠病毒變異株Omicron肆虐，令全球經濟增長繼續受壓，通脹壓力亦持續上升。其後俄羅斯與烏克蘭爆發衝突，進一步推高通脹壓力，導致各主要央行採取前置式貨幣緊縮政策，擴大環球金融市場的波動，並加劇經濟增長放緩的風險。本地方面，第五波疫情爆發，感染個案急速上升，亦進一步打擊經濟。同時，圍繞防疫措施與檢疫限制的負面報道，更令外界對香港產生誤解，威脅香港作為國際金融中心的聲譽。全年計，香港實質本地生產總值收縮了3.5%。
mt_raw: At the beginning of 2022, the global economic environment was bleak. The COVID-19 Omicron variant was ravaging, continuing to pressure global economic growth, and inflationary pressures remained elevated. Subsequently, the outbreak of conflict between Russia and Ukraine further intensified inflation pressures, prompting major central banks to adopt front-loaded monetary tightening policies, which increased volatility in the global financial markets and heightened the risks of economic slowdown. Domestically, the fifth wave of the pandemic broke out, with cases rising rapidly, further undermining the economy. Meanwhile, negative reports surrounding epidemic control measures and quarantine restrictions fostered misunderstandings about Hong Kong externally, threatening Hong Kong’s reputation as an international financial centre. Throughout the year, Hong Kong’s real gross domestic product contracted by 3.5%.

terms: {'國際金融領袖投資峰會': 'Global Financial Leaders’ Investment Summit'}
src_raw: 儘管面對重重挑戰，金管局繼續致力保障香港貨幣與金融穩定，並於主要策略範疇推進多項有利發展的措施，進一步鞏固香港的國際金融中心地位。經歷3年的旅遊限制後，我們成功向國際社會展示香港已全面復常，旅客亦能再次親身訪港體驗。金管局在去年11月舉辦「國際金融領袖投資峰會」，來自世界各地的金融領袖親身來港出席。外界如此熱烈的反應，成為印證香港全面復常最好不過的證明。
mt_raw: Despite numerous challenges, the HKMA continued to dedicate efforts to maintaining monetary and financial stability in Hong Kong, and advanced several development-oriented measures across key strategic areas, further consolidating Hong Kong’s position as an international financial centre. After three years of travel restrictions, we successfully demonstrated to the international community that Hong Kong has fully resumed normal operation, and travelers can once again visit Hong Kong in person. In November of last year, the HKMA hosted the “Global Financial Leaders’ Investment Summit,” which attracted financial leaders from around the world to visit Hong Kong in person. The enthusiastic responses from the global community served as the best proof of Hong Kong’s full resumption of normalcy.

src_raw: 展望未來，外圍環境仍然充滿前所未有的不確定性。儘管如此，內地經濟重啟會為香港以至整個地區重新注入動力。金管局將繼續緊守崗位，履行維持香港貨幣與銀行體系穩定的職能，並積極尋求更多有利香港發展的機會，展現及提升香港作為國際金融中心的競爭力。我們亦會繼續為提升全球氣候應變能力及可持續發展出力。今年除《二零二二年年報》外，我們會另外發表《二零二二年可持續發展報告》，以便更詳細地介紹金管局在提升香港作為綠色和可持續金融樞紐的地位所進行的各項工作，以及金管局作為負責任投資者及可持續機構所作出的努力。
mt_raw: Looking ahead, the external environment remains filled with unprecedented uncertainties. Nonetheless, the restarting of the Mainland economy will inject renewed momentum into Hong Kong and the wider region. The HKMA will continue to uphold its role, fulfilling its responsibilities to sustain the stability of Hong Kong’s currency and banking system, and actively seek more opportunities conducive to Hong Kong’s development, demonstrating and enhancing Hong Kong’s competitiveness as an international financial centre. We will also continue our efforts to enhance global climate resilience and sustainable development. This year, in addition to the 2022 Annual Report, we will publish the “2022 Sustainability Report,” providing a more detailed account of the HKMA’s work to strengthen Hong Kong’s status as a green and sustainable finance hub, as well as the efforts made as a responsible investor and sustainable institution.

terms: {'匯率': 'exchange value', '港元': 'HKD', '美國聯邦儲備局': 'US Federal Reserve', '聯儲局': 'Fed', '聯匯制度': 'LERS', '聯邦儲備局': 'Federal Reserve'}
src_raw: 聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）自1983年實施至今，歷經多個經濟周期，成功抵禦各種各樣的外來衝擊。2022年再次見證聯匯制度的抗震能力。在美國聯邦儲備局（聯儲局）大幅收緊貨幣政策下，弱方兌換保證於2022年5月至11月期間被觸發41次，金管局按照既定機制，以有序及具透明度的方式從市場買入合共2,421億港元。其間港元匯率及貨幣市場繼續運作暢順，反映聯匯制度穩健有效。
mt_raw: The Linked Exchange Rate System (LERS) has been in place since 1983, successfully weathered multiple economic cycles, and withstood various external shocks. The system demonstrated its resilience once again in 2022. Under the significant tightening of monetary policy by the US Federal Reserve, the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking was triggered 41 times between May and November 2022. The HKMA, according to established mechanisms, orderly and transparently purchased a total of HK$242.1 billion from the market. During this period, the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate and the money markets continued smoothly, reflecting the robustness and effectiveness of the LERS.

src_raw: 這份對聯匯制度的信心，來自於建立多年的穩固根基。正如國際貨幣基金組織在其《2022年對外部門報告》中重申，聯匯制度的公信力建基於多項因素，包括具高透明度的運作規則、充裕的外匯儲備、審慎的財政制度、穩健的金融監管，以及靈活的經濟結構。
mt_raw: Confidence in the Linked Exchange Rate System is built on a solid foundation accumulated over many years. As reaffirmed in the IMF’s “External Sector Report 2022,” the credibility of the LERS is based on several factors, including high transparency in operation rules, ample foreign exchange reserves, prudent fiscal policies, sound financial regulation, and an adaptable economic structure.

src_raw: 我們深信除了穩健的機制外，致力與公眾及市場溝通以加深其對聯匯制度的了解、進行有效的市場監察，以及就不同情景作出應變計劃，均有助鞏固各界對聯匯制度的信心。我們就聯匯制度運作機制推出的社交媒體宣傳活動，有助在年內弱方兌換保證多次被觸發的情況下，有效維護市場對聯匯制度的信心。內部方面，金管局亦善用數據分析技術加強市場監察，讓我們能適時回應最新市場形勢。
mt_raw: We firmly believe that, beyond robust mechanisms, effective communication with the public and markets to deepen understanding of the LERS, vigilant market surveillance, and contingency planning under various scenarios all contribute to strengthening market confidence in the system. Our social media campaigns promoting the operation mechanism of the LERS have helped maintain market confidence in the system, even in years with frequent triggers of the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking. Internally, the HKMA also leverages data analysis to enhance market monitoring, enabling timely responses to the latest market developments.

src_raw: 年內，儘管面對宏觀層面的挑戰以及遞增的信用風險，香港銀行體系仍然維持穩健，資本及流動性均非常充裕。2022年底，本地銀行的綜合總資本充足比率為20.1%，遠高於國際最低要求的8%。2022年第4季，大型銀行的流動性覆蓋比率稍升至162.3%，亦遠高於法定最低要求的100%。鑑於信貸環境面對挑戰，銀行體系的資產質素略為轉差，特定分類貸款比率於2022年底升至1.38%，但有關水平仍屬穩健，並低於2000年以來的長期平均水平1.8%。
mt_raw: Despite macroeconomic challenges and rising credit risks during the year, Hong Kong’s banking sector remained resilient, with capital and liquidity levels being highly sufficient. At the end of 2022, the local banks’ aggregate total capital adequacy ratio stood at 20.1%, well above the international minimum requirement of 8%. In Q4 2022, the liquidity coverage ratio of large banks rose slightly to 162.3%, also well above the statutory minimum of 100%. Given the challenging credit environment, asset quality indicators slightly worsened, with the classified loan ratio rising to 1.38% at the end of 2022. Nonetheless, this level remains prudent, and still below the long-term average of 1.8% since 2000.

terms: {'去全球化': 'de-globalisation', '歐洲': 'Europe', '金融市場': 'financial markets'}
src_raw: 儘管香港經濟在2023 年初出現復甦跡象，但外圍環境仍然充滿挑戰及不確定性。近期美國和歐洲的銀行業受壓，個別美國本土銀行在2023 年3 月倒閉，對環球金融市場造成漣漪效應，而主要央行收緊貨幣政策，很有可能令2023 年全球經濟增長放緩甚或衰退。另一方面，地緣政治局勢緊張，以及去全球化的威脅持續，可能會繼續拖累全球貿易，並會令環球金融市場不時出現波動。儘管如此，香港金融體系憑藉多年來所建立穩健的抗震能力及充裕的緩衝，有足夠能力抵禦不利衝擊。
mt_raw: Although Hong Kong’s economy showed signs of recovery in early 2023, the external environment remains fraught with challenges and uncertainty. Recently, the banking sectors in the US and Europe have come under pressure, with certain US domestic banks collapsing in March 2023, causing ripples across the global financial markets. Major central banks' tightening of monetary policy is very likely to slow down or even cause a recession in global economic growth in 2023. On the other hand, rising geopolitical tensions and the ongoing threat of de-globalization may continue to hamper global trade and induce periodic volatility in global financial markets. Nevertheless, Hong Kong’s financial system, built on years of robust resilience and ample buffers, possesses sufficient capacity to withstand adverse shocks.

src_raw: 金管局非常重視保障貨幣及金融穩定。展望未來，面對不明朗的宏觀經濟環境，金管局會保持警惕，力求迅速辨識正浮現的風險，並靈活應對。與此同時，金管局會繼續把握機遇及創造政策空間，進一步提升香港作為主要國際金融中心的地位。面對充滿挑戰的投資環境，金管局在管理外匯基金時會繼續審慎投資，同時保持足夠靈活性，按需要採取防禦措施，並維持高流動性。
mt_raw: The HKMA places great importance on safeguarding monetary and financial stability. Looking forward, amidst an uncertain macroeconomic environment, the HKMA will stay vigilant, aiming to swiftly identify emerging risks and respond flexibly. Meanwhile, the HKMA will continue to seize opportunities and create policy space to further enhance Hong Kong’s position as a major international financial centre. In the face of challenging investment environments, the HKMA will prudently manage the Exchange Fund investments, remaining sufficiently flexible, adopting defensive measures as needed, and maintaining high liquidity.

mt_raw: In 2023, uncertainties regarding the future trajectory of US interest rates, as well as stresses emerging in the banking sectors of advanced economies, may pose downside risks to the growth outlook of major advanced economies. src_raw: 鑑於地緣政治緊張局勢升級，以及各主要央行大幅加息以遏抑通脹，預計2023年銀行業的經營環境仍然充滿挑戰。另一方面，科技發展迅速及數碼化對銀行業來說既有危又有機。面對瞬息萬變的金融環境，金管局致力透過持續的監管工作確保銀行具足夠能力抵禦衝擊。與此同時，金管局亦會參照國際標準及最佳做法，繼續加強及優化銀行監管架構與政策。
mt_raw: Given escalating geopolitical tensions and significant interest rate hikes by major central banks to curb inflation, the banking sector’s operational environment in 2023 is expected to remain challenging. Meanwhile, rapid technological advancements and digitalization present both risks and opportunities for banks. In response to the rapidly changing financial landscape, the HKMA remains committed to ensuring banks have sufficient resilience through continuous supervision. At the same time, the HKMA will reference international standards and best practices to strengthen and optimize its banking supervision framework and policies.

mt_raw: In 2023, the HKMA will maintain close vigilance over the asset quality of authorized institutions, focusing on their loan classification and provisioning practices, as well as the management of borrowers with weaker financial conditions. The HKMA will also enhance its supervisory systems and take proactive measures to ensure that overall credit risk levels within the banking sector remain manageable.

src_raw: 隨着銀行在業務營運中更廣泛應用科技，金管局會致力提升銀行業的運作穩健性及網絡防衛能力。繼5月發出《監管政策手冊》新單元「運作穩健性」後，金管局會與業界保持緊密聯繫，審視認可機構在制定運作穩健性框架方面的進度。同時，金管局將透過跟進認可機構在「網絡防衛評估框架2.0」評估下發現的問題以及檢視認可機構實施穩固三重數據備份的進展，提高銀行業的網絡防衛能力。
mt_raw: As banks increasingly deploy technology in their operations, the HKMA will aim to enhance operational resilience and cyber defenses. Following the issuance of the new section “Operational Resilience” amid the “Supervisory Policy Manual" in May, the HKMA will stay in close contact with the industry, reviewing the progress made by authorized institutions in establishing operational resilience frameworks. Concurrently, the HKMA will follow up on issues identified under the “Cyber Resilience Assessment Framework 2.0” and review the implementation of robust tertiary data backup measures, thereby increasing banks’ cyber resilience.

src_raw: 在2023年，金管局的工作重點包括更新監管資訊、加強打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集（反洗錢）生態系統各持份者的合作以應對洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集（洗錢）風險，以及進一步推動反洗錢監管科技與合規科技的發展。金管局的《打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集指引》亦會作出修訂，並會就「政治人物」採取與風險相稱的措施發出具體指引，從而促進業界以有效及風險為本的方法落實法例的主要修訂。與此同時，金管局會擴大現有公私營夥伴合作的涵蓋範圍以加強訊息共享，以及支持推出銀行之間的訊息共享平台，藉以加快偵測可疑戶口及防範戶口被濫用，並加強對騙案受害人的保障和協助受害人追討損失。金管局亦會透過「反洗錢合規科技實驗室」及其他反洗錢合規科技項目，進一步集中推動採用合規科技（包括數據分析），並致力發展宏觀分析能力，以配合其數據為本的反洗錢監管工作。透過實施上述各項措施，金管局將能更迅速針對傀儡戶口網絡等系統性洗錢風險採取相應措施，以及靈活應對不斷轉變的威脅。
mt_raw: In 2023, the HKMA’s priorities include updating regulatory information, strengthening cooperation among stakeholders across the AML ecosystem to address money laundering and terrorist financing risks, and advancing the development of AML supervisory and compliance technology. The HKMA’s “Guideline on Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Financing of Terrorism” will be revised, and specific guidance will be issued regarding measures proportionate to the risks associated with “politically exposed persons”, to promote a risk-based approach in the effective and compliant implementation of legislative amendments. Simultaneously, the HKMA will broaden existing public-private partnership frameworks to enhance information sharing, support the rollout of a message-sharing platform among banks to speed up suspicious account detection and prevent account misuse, and strengthen protection and assistance for victims. Additionally, the HKMA will leverage the “AML Regtech Lab” and other AML compliance technology projects to promote the adoption of Regtech—including data analytics—and develop macro-analytical capabilities to support its data-driven AML regulation. Through these measures, the HKMA aims to respond swiftly to systemic AML risks such as mule account networks and adapt to evolving threats.

src_raw: 金管局在2023年會加強有關認可機構在財富管理以及銷售證券、強制性公積金（強積金）與其他投資及保險產品方面的操守的現場審查及非現場監察。2023年的重點將會是「跨境理財通」計劃、數碼分銷及諮詢平台、虛擬資產、環境、社會及管治(ESG)投資產品及長期保險產品。金管局在有關過程中會參考市場最新發展及國際標準的修訂。
mt_raw: In 2023, the HKMA will strengthen on-site examinations and offsite supervision concerning authorized institutions' conduct in wealth management as well as the sale of securities, Mandatory Provident Funds (MPF), and other investment and insurance products. The focus will be on the “Cross-boundary Wealth Management Connect” scheme, digital distribution and advisory platforms, virtual assets, ESG investment products, and long-term insurance products. The HKMA will also reference the latest market developments and international standards when implementing these processes.

src_raw: 金管局的目標是按照《支付系統及儲值支付工具條例》（《支付條例》）、《金融市場基建的原則》（《基建原則》），以及支付及金融基建委員會發出的各項指引促進其所監察的金融市場基建的安全及效率，按需要參照最新的國際標準評估各項基建。金管局會參與支付及金融基建委員會與國際證監會組織對實施《基建原則》的監察及評估計劃，亦會參與國際標準制定組織的工作，並參照國際慣例或因應市場及科技發展加強本身的監察規定。同時，如有需要，金管局會與有關當局合作，進一步加強合作監察安排。
mt_raw: The HKMA aims to promote the safety and efficiency of the financial market infrastructure it supervises, in accordance with the “Payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance” (“Payment Ordinance”), the “Principles for Financial Market Infrastructures” (“PFMI”), and guidance issued by the Committee on Payments and Market Infrastructures. It will evaluate each infrastructure’s compliance with the latest international standards as needed. The HKMA will participate in the oversight and assessment programs of PFMI and IOSCO, and contribute to the development of international standards, while referencing best practices and adjusting regulations to market and technological developments. When necessary, the HKMA will collaborate further with relevant authorities to strengthen oversight arrangements.

src_raw:
金管局會透過實施巴塞爾銀行監管委員會（巴塞爾委員會）近年發布的標準，進一步優化資本框架，當中包括：
- 2017年12月《巴塞爾協定三：危機後改革的最終方案》、2019年1月（2019年2月修訂）《市場風險最低資本規定》，以及2020年7月《信用估值調整風險架構具針對性的修訂》所載的經修訂資本標準 — 上述經修訂資本標準統稱《巴塞爾協定三》最終改革方案，載明信用風險、市場風險、信用估值調整風險及業務操作風險的新監管處理方法，並引入出項下限規定，以及優化槓桿比率框架。經過2022年的多輪業界諮詢後，金管局計劃在2023年就《銀行業（資本）規則》（《資本規則》）的建議修訂進行法定諮詢，以實施上述各項規定及正值中性逆周期緩衝資本。有關修訂預計於同年內提交立法會進行先訂立後審議程序，並不早於2024年1月1日生效，作為最低要求。
- 2022年12月《加密資產風險承擔的審慎處理方法》金管局計劃按照巴塞爾委員會的時間表，在2025年1月1日於本地實施有關標準，並打算於2023年就相關建議諮詢業界。
mt_raw:
The HKMA will adopt the standards issued by the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision (Basel Committee) in recent years to further optimize its capital framework, including:
- The “Final Reform Package of Basel III” published in December 2017, the “Minimum Capital Requirements for Market Risk” issued in January 2019 (revised in February 2019), and the “Targeted Revisions to the Credit Valuation Adjustment Risk Framework” issued in July 2020—collectively referred to as the “Final Reform of Basel III”—which specify new regulatory approaches for credit risk, market risk, credit valuation adjustment risk, and operational risk, include the introduction of output floors, and optimize the leverage ratio framework. After multiple industry consultations in 2022, the HKMA plans to conduct statutory consultation within 2023 on proposed amendments to the “Banking (Capital) Rules” (“Capital Rules”) to implement these measures and the positive neutral countercyclical capital buffer. The amendments are expected to be submitted to the Legislative Council within 2023 for negative vetting, with a commencement date no earlier than January 1, 2024, as the minimum requirement.
- The HKMA also plans to implement, by January 1, 2025, the relevant standards on “Prudent Treatment of Cryptoasset Exposures” as part of the Basel Committee’s timetable, following industry consultation in 2023.

src_raw: 《巴塞爾協定三》最終改革方案中與經修訂資本標準相關的新的及經修訂的披露規定，主要載於巴塞爾委員會分別於2018年12月及2021年11月發出的《第三支柱1 披露規定 — 更新框架》及《修訂市場風險披露規定》。巴塞爾委員會亦於2019年6月發出《修訂槓桿比率披露規定》，藉修訂槓桿比率的披露規定處理對潛在「粉飾櫥窗」（指銀行在報告日期前後減少某些交易的交易量，從而人為地提高報告及公開披露的槓桿比率）的關注。為在香港實施上述新的及經修訂的披露規定，金管局亦正擬備《銀行業（披露）規則》（《披露規則》）的相應修訂，以及經修訂後的標準披露模版及表格，並在過程中徵詢業界意見。預計《披露規則》的修訂將於2023年內連同《資本規則》的修訂一併提交立法會進行先訂立後審議程序。
mt_raw: The new and revised disclosure requirements related to the updated capital standards under Basel III’s Final Reform are mainly included in the “Third Pillar Disclosure Requirements—Updated Framework” issued by the Basel Committee in December 2018 and November 2021, as well as the “Revised Market Risk Disclosure Requirements” issued in June 2019. The Basel Committee also introduced the “Revised Leverage Ratio Disclosure Requirements” to address concerns related to potential “window dressing”—where banks may temporarily reduce trading activity before reporting to artificially inflate leverage ratios. To facilitate implementation in Hong Kong, the HKMA is currently preparing amendments to the “Banking (Disclosures) Rules” (“Disclosures Rules”) and updating the standard disclosure templates and forms, which will be submitted with the amendments for vetting by the Legislative Council within 2023.

src_raw:
金融管理專員由財政司司長委任，因此金管局透過財政司司長向公眾負責；而由於金管局的職權由立法會通過的法律制訂，因此金管局亦透過立法會向公眾負責。金管局亦明白本身肩負更廣泛的責任，就是促進公眾對金管局角色及目標的認識，並密切留意社會人士所關注的事項。金管局在執行日常工作及與社會保持廣泛聯繫時，堅守盡力提高透明度及保持開放的政策。這項政策有兩大目標：
- 在顧及市場敏感性、商業秘密及機密資料披露的法定限制下，盡量使金融界及公眾充分了解金管局的工作；及
- 確保金管局掌握社會脈搏，並對公眾意見作出適當回應。
mt_raw:
Since the Financial Management Specialist is appointed by the Financial Secretary, the HKMA is accountable to the public through the Financial Secretary; and because its powers are established by legislation passed by the Legislative Council, it is also accountable through the Legislative Council. Furthermore, the HKMA recognizes its broader responsibility to promote public understanding of its role and objectives, and to closely monitor societal concerns. In executing its daily tasks and maintaining extensive communication outreach, the HKMA adheres to a policy of striving for transparency and openness. This policy has two main objectives:
- To ensure that, within statutory restrictions on market sensitivity, trade secrets, and confidential information disclosure, the financial industry and the public can obtain sufficient understanding of the HKMA’s work; and
- To keep abreast of societal pulse and respond appropriately to public opinion.

src_raw: 金管局在透明度方面致力達致國際最高標準，與傳媒保持廣泛聯繫之餘，亦出版各種中英文期刊及專題刊物。金管局的雙語網站(www.hkma.gov.hk)除有專門環節列載經濟研究、統計資料、監管資源、消費者資訊及其他課題外，還載有大量金管局出版的刊物、新聞稿、演辭及簡報會資料文件。此外，金管局又利用社交媒體平台，以能在數碼時代中更有效與公眾溝通。金管局辦事處設有資訊中心，分為圖書館及展覽館兩部分，每星期開放6日予公眾參觀及使用。有關金管局與公眾溝通及聯繫的工作，詳見「機構職能」一章（第157至162頁）。
mt_raw: The HKMA is dedicated to achieving the highest international standards of transparency. Besides maintaining extensive relationships with the media, it publishes various bilingual journals and special publications. Its bilingual website (www.hkma.gov.hk) not only features sections dedicated to economic research, statistical data, regulatory resources, consumer information, and other topics, but also hosts a wealth of publications, press releases, speeches, and briefing materials. Additionally, the HKMA actively uses social media platforms to communicate more effectively with the public in the digital era. Its information center consists of a library and an exhibition hall, both open to the public six days a week. Details of the HKMA’s communication and outreach efforts are provided in the “Institutional Functions” chapter (pages 157–162).

src_raw: 面對第五波新冠病毒疫情、金融狀況收緊及充滿挑戰的外圍環境，香港經濟在2022年顯著收縮。勞工市場持續一段時間轉差，其後逐步改善，而通脹則維持溫和。資產市場亦有所受壓。受惠於內地與香港全面通關，預計2023年香港經濟增長將由低位復甦。
mt_raw: Faced with the fifth wave of COVID-19, tightening of financial conditions, and a challenging external environment, Hong Kong's economy contracted significantly in 2022. The labour market remained weak for a period before gradually improving, while inflation remained moderate. The asset markets were also under pressure. src_raw: 受本地及外圍環境各項不利因素拖累，香港經濟在2022年收縮3.5%（表1及圖1）。本地方面，由於香港爆發第五波新冠病毒疫情，私人消費在第1季急跌，其後受惠於社交距離措施逐步放寬及政府消費券計劃的刺激，私人消費再度錄得按季增長。在營商氣氛疲弱及金融狀況收緊下，整體投資支出較2021年顯著下跌。對外方面，隨着外部需求轉弱，加上內地與香港之間的跨境陸路貨運受阻，香港貨物出口下挫。服務輸出依然大致疲弱，部分反映訪港旅遊活動低迷，但其後隨着政府於9月下旬撤銷抵港強制檢疫要求，情況於第4季稍為改善。
mt_raw: Driven by various adverse factors domestically and externally, Hong Kong's economy shrank by 3.5% in 2022 (Table 1 and Figure 1). On the domestic front, the outbreak of the fifth wave of COVID-19 caused a sharp decline in private consumption in the first quarter. Subsequently, aided by the gradual relaxation of social distancing measures and the刺激 (stimulus) of the government’s consumption voucher scheme, private consumption rebounded with quarter-on-quarter growth. Amid weak business sentiment and tightening financial conditions, overall investment expenditure declined markedly compared to 2021. Externally, as external demand weakened and cross-border land transportation between Mainland China and Hong Kong faced disruptions, Hong Kong's merchandise exports fell. Service exports remained generally weak, partly reflecting subdued inbound tourism activities, but conditions slightly improved in the fourth quarter as the government lifted quarantine requirements for arrivals in late September.

src_raw: 本地通脹壓力於2022年稍升，但仍屬溫和。具體而言，按年基本通脹率逐步上升至12月2%的溫和水平，其中外圍能源及食品價格高企的影響部分被溫和的本地成本壓力所抵銷，尤其是偏軟的房屋租金（圖2）。此外，在經濟活動疲弱下，名義工資增長及商業樓宇租金持續偏軟，亦有助遏抑通脹。2022年全年合計，基本及整體通脹率分別為1.7%及1.9%。
mt_raw: Domestic inflation pressures slightly increased in 2022 but remained moderate. Specifically, the annual core inflation rate gradually rose to a mild 2% by December. The impact of elevated external energy and food prices was partly offset by moderate domestic cost pressures, especially soft housing rents (Figure 2). Additionally, weak economic activity kept nominal wage growth and commercial building rents subdued, further helping to curb inflation. For the full year of 2022, the core and overall inflation rates stood at 1.7% and 1.9%, respectively.

terms: {'勞動人口': 'labour force', '勞動人口參與率': 'labour force participation rate', '私營機構職位空缺': 'private sector vacancies'}
src_raw: 疫情下勞工市場狀況在2022年初急速惡化，但隨後持續改善。失業率在4月升至5.4%的高位後，於12月顯著回落至3.5%（圖3），當中大多數行業的失業率均有所下降。總就業人數（圖3）及私營機構職位空缺回升，反映整體勞工需求逐步回復，惟總就業人數仍低於疫情前水平。名義工資和勞工收入的按年升幅亦略為加快。另一方面，與去年同期比較，勞動人口於12月略為減少1.5%，部分原因是勞動人口參與率輕微下跌。
mt_raw: The labour market deteriorated sharply in early 2022 amid the pandemic but subsequently improved. The unemployment rate rose to a high of 5.4% in April before dropping significantly to 3.5% in December (Figure 3), with unemployment rates declining across most sectors. Total employment (Figure 3) and vacancies in the private sector rebounded, reflecting a gradual recovery in overall labour demand, although total employment remained below pre-pandemic levels. Nominal wages and labour income growth also modestly accelerated year-on-year. Conversely, compared to the previous year, the labour force in December slightly decreased by 1.5%, partly due to a marginal decline in labour force participation rate.

src_raw: 本港股市在2022年出現大幅波動。承接2021年的下行趨勢，恒生指數加速下跌，在2022年10月31日收報14,687點，是自2009年以來的最低水平（圖4）。股市顯著調整，最初是由市場對本地新冠病毒疫情、美國加息及俄烏局勢的憂慮加劇所觸發，其後由於環球金融狀況收緊及內地新冠病毒疫情導致環球經濟前景轉差，令股市調整幅度進一步擴大。股市在年內最後兩個月重拾一些上升動力，部分受到內地優化防疫抗疫措施所支持。恒生指數於年底收報19,781點，較2021年底顯著下跌15.5%，連續第三年下挫。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong stock market experienced significant volatility in 2022. Continuing the downward trend from 2021, the Hang Seng Index (HSI) accelerated its decline, closing at 14,687 points on October 31, 2022, the lowest level since 2009 (Figure 4). The sharp correction was initially triggered by concerns over local COVID-19 outbreaks, US rate hikes, and the Russia-Ukraine situation, and further deepened as global financial conditions tightened and the outlook worsened due to the resurgence of COVID-19 in Mainland China. In the last two months of the year, the market regained some upward momentum, partly supported by Mainland China’s easing of epidemic controls. The HSI closed at 19,781 points at the end of the year, representing a 15.5% decline from the end of 2021, marking the third consecutive year of decline.

src_raw: 在金融狀況收緊及經濟活動疲弱下，住宅物業市場亦有所受壓。樓價於2022年回落15%（圖4），成交量也大幅縮減39%至45,050宗，創下有紀錄以來的新低。儘管樓價下跌，置業負擔能力仍然偏緊。實際按揭利率於年內由約1.6厘上升至3.375至3.625厘，增加供樓人士的按揭供款負擔。非住宅物業市場亦進一步回軟。在空置率高企下，其價格有所回落，租金亦維持偏軟。
mt_raw: Amid tighter financial conditions and subdued economic activity, the residential property market also came under pressure. Property prices declined by 15% in 2022 (Figure 4), while transaction volumes fell sharply by 39% to 45,050, setting a record low. Despite the price correction, housing affordability remained tight. The actual mortgage interest rate increased from about 1.6% to between 3.375% and 3.625%, raising mortgage payments for homebuyers. The non-residential property market also softened further, with high vacancy rates leading to price declines and rents remaining subdued.

src_raw: 受惠於內地與香港全面通關，預期2023年香港經濟增長將由低位復甦。儘管先進經濟體增長預期放緩將繼續拖累香港貨物出口，但內地經濟復甦及跨境陸路貨運限制撤銷，應能為本港經濟提供支持。內地與香港全面通關亦有望令香港入境旅遊及其他服務輸出顯著受惠，並提振本地營商氣氛及資本開支。私人消費亦將會在勞工市場轉強下進一步改善。政府預測2023年全年實質本地生產總值會顯著增長，介乎3.5至5.5%。然而，香港經濟增長前景仍受眾多風險及不明朗因素所影響，並很大程度上取決於美國聯邦儲備局政策利率走勢、全球增長前景、地緣政治局勢持續緊張以及本地入境旅遊的復甦步伐。
mt_raw: Benefiting from全面通關 (full border reopening) between Mainland China and Hong Kong, Hong Kong's economy is expected to rebound from a low base in 2023. While the slowdown in growth among major advanced economies will continue to weigh on Hong Kong’s merchandise exports, the recovery of the Mainland economy and the lifting of cross-border land transportation restrictions are expected to support the local economy. The comprehensive border reopening is also anticipated to significantly benefit inbound tourism and other service exports, boosting business sentiment and capital expenditure. Private consumption is expected to further improve as the labour market recovers. The government forecasts that real GDP will grow significantly in 2023, within the range of 3.5% to 5.5%. However, the outlook remains subject to numerous risks and uncertainties, largely depending on the policy rate trajectory of the US Federal Reserve, global growth prospects, ongoing geopolitical tensions, and the pace of inbound tourism recovery.

src_raw: 香港銀行體系在2022年面對充滿挑戰的宏觀經濟環境，包括年初爆發第五波新冠病毒疫情、地緣政治局勢升溫，以及全球各大央行大幅度加息應對通脹上升等。面對各項挑戰，香港銀行應付裕如，資本及流動性狀況繼續保持充裕。年內銀行體系面對的信貸風險增加，但整體資產質素維持於健康水平。與此同時，利率上升促使銀行淨利息收入增加，但其正面影響因呆壞帳準備金增加及費用與佣金收入減少而被局部抵銷。整體而言，零售銀行盈利較2021年改善。
mt_raw: Hong Kong’s banking sector faced a challenging macroeconomic environment in 2022, including the outbreak of the fifth wave of COVID-19 at the beginning of the year, rising geopolitical tensions, and major increases in global interest rates in response to inflation. Despite the challenges, banks remained resilient, maintaining ample capital and liquidity. Credit risk increased during the year, but asset quality remained healthy. Concurrently, rising interest rates boosted net interest income, though this positive effect was partly offset by higher allowances for credit-impaired assets and decreased fee and commission income. Overall, retail banks showed improved profitability compared to 2021.

src_raw: 銀行體系的特定分類貸款比率由2021年底的0.89%上升至2022年底的1.38%，逾期及經重組貸款比率於同期由0.56%升至0.85%（圖5）。中國內地相關貸款的特定分類貸款比率於2022年底為2.21%，亦較2021年底的0.89%上升。特定分類貸款比率上升，主要是由於部分內地房地產發展商的貸款評級被下調。儘管如此，銀行撥備充足，截至2022年底，銀行信貸撥備覆蓋率（即信貸撥備和特定分類貸款比率）約維持於80%。若將抵押品變現價值從呆壞帳餘額中扣除，銀行信貸撥備覆蓋率約140%。另一方面，2022年底住宅按揭貸款及信用卡貸款的拖欠比率仍然處於低位，分別為0.06%及0.23%（圖6）。
mt_raw: The ratio of classified loans in the banking sector increased from 0.89% at the end of 2021 to 1.38% at the end of 2022. The ratio of overdue and rescheduled loans rose from 0.56% to 0.85% during the same period (Figure 5). The specific classified loan ratio related to Mainland China exposures stood at 2.21% at the end of 2022, up from 0.89% at the end of 2021, mainly due to downgrades of some real estate developers’ credit ratings in Mainland China. Nonetheless, banks maintained sufficient provisions, with the provision coverage ratio (i.e., total provisions to classified loans) remaining around 80% at the end of 2022. After deducting the market value of collateral from the overdue and rescheduled loan balances, the total coverage ratio rose to approximately 140%. Meanwhile, at the end of 2022, delinquency rates for residential mortgages and credit card loans remained low at 0.06% and 0.23%, respectively (Figure 6).

src_raw: 銀行體系在2022年繼續錄得盈利。年內零售銀行的整體除稅前經營溢利上升19.0%（圖7）。盈利改善是受惠於淨利息收入（+34%）及外匯與衍生工具收入增加（+72%），但部分升幅被呆壞帳準備金增加（+151%）及費用與佣金收入減少（–19%）所抵銷。在加息環境下，淨息差由上一年的0.98%擴闊至2022年的1.31%（圖8）。年內市場波動增加，亦令銀行來自外匯及衍生工具業務的收入增加。呆壞帳準備金增加是由於須為新的特定分類貸款預留特殊準備金，而在金融市場表現疲弱下，費用及佣金收入減少。零售銀行成本與收入比率由2021年的54.7%，降至2022年的48.0%（圖9）。
mt_raw: The banking sector continued to record profits in 2022. The pre-tax operating profit of retail banks increased by 19.0% over the year (Figure 7). The profit growth was driven mainly by a 34% increase in net interest income and a 72% rise in income from forex and derivatives activities, though partly offset by a 151% increase in allowances for credit-impaired assets and a 19% decline in fees and commissions. In an environment of rising interest rates, net interest margin expanded from 0.98% in the previous year to 1.31% in 2022 (Figure 8). A higher market volatility during the year also contributed to increased income from forex and derivatives business. The rise in allowances was mainly due to provisions for new specific classified loans, while weaker market conditions reduced fee and commission income. The cost-to-income ratio of retail banks fell from 54.7% in 2021 to 48.0% in 2022 (Figure 9).

src_raw: 2022年銀行體系資產負債表擴大2.5%。資產上升是由於外匯及衍生工具持倉按市價計值增加。面對外圍不明朗因素及利率趨升，年內貸款需求減弱。相比2021年錄得3.8%的增幅，2022年貸款總額減少3.0%。其中在香港境外使用的貸款減少10.2%，貿易融資減少13.5%，在香港使用的貸款則稍增0.9%。中國內地相關貸款繼2021年增長3.7%後，於2022年減少4.4%。
mt_raw: The banking sector’s total assets and liabilities expanded by 2.5% in 2022. The increase in assets was mainly due to higher valuation of foreign exchange and derivatives holdings at market value. Facing external uncertainties and rising interest rates, loan demand weakened during the year. Compared to a 3.8% increase in 2021, total loans in 2022 decreased by 3.0%. Specifically, loans used outside Hong Kong declined by 10.2%, trade financing decreased by 13.5%, while loans used within Hong Kong marginally increased by 0.9%. Mainland China-related loans fell by 4.4% in 2022 after growing 3.7% in 2021.

src_raw: 銀行體系的流動性狀況繼續維持穩健，成為在宏觀經濟環境不明朗因素加劇下的重要支柱。第1類機構的季度平均流動性覆蓋比率在2022年第4季為162.3%，第2類機構的季度平均流動性維持比率為63.2%（圖13）。銀行體系的主要資金來源仍然是客戶存款。於2022年底，第1類機構的穩定資金淨額比率及第2A類機構的核心資金比率分別為137.7%及155.7%（圖14）。以上所有4個比率均遠高於法定最低要求。
mt_raw: The liquidity positions of the banking sector continued to be resilient, serving as a crucial pillar amid increasing macroeconomic uncertainties. The average quarterly liquidity coverage ratio for Class 1 institutions was 162.3% in Q4 2022, while the average quarterly core funding ratio for Class 2 institutions stood at 63.2% (Figure 13). The main source of funding for banks remained customer deposits. At the end of 2022, the net stable funding ratio for Class 1 institutions and the core funding ratio for Class 2A institutions were 137.7% and 155.7%, respectively (Figure 14). All four ratios remained well above the statutory minimum requirements.

src_raw: 隨着美國收緊貨幣政策，港元在2022年轉弱，弱方兌換保證於5月至11月期間被觸發41次。在本港股市成交轉旺及年底季節性資金需求的帶動下，港元在11月中開始轉強。在聯繫匯率制度下，香港銀行同業拆息大致跟隨美元銀行同業拆息的走勢。由於美國持續加息，香港銀行同業拆息於2022年內逐步上升。整體而言，港元外匯及貨幣市場保持穩定，交易暢順有序。作為香港貨幣及金融穩定的基石，聯繫匯率制度一直展現強大抵禦外來衝擊的能力。
mt_raw: With the US tightening monetary policy, the Hong Kong dollar weakened in 2022, and the Weak-side Convertibility Undertaking was triggered 41 times from May to November. Driven by active turnover in the Hong Kong stock market and seasonal end-of-year capital demand, the Hong Kong dollar started to strengthen in mid-November. Under the Linked Exchange Rate System, Hong Kong's interbank market interest rates roughly followed the movement of US dollar interbank rates. Due to continued US rate hikes, Hong Kong dollar interbank rates gradually rose in 2022. Overall, the Hong Kong dollar foreign exchange and monetary markets remained stable, with smooth and orderly trading. As the cornerstone of Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability, the Linked Exchange Rate System has demonstrated strong resilience against external shocks.

src_raw: 香港貨幣政策的主要目標是維持貨幣穩定，即確保港元匯價穩定，使港元在外匯市場兌美元的匯率保持在7.75至7.85港元兌1美元的區間內。該貨幣體制主要採用貨幣發行局制度，規定由外匯基金所持的美元儲備向貨幣基礎提供最少百分之百的支持；貨幣基礎若有變動，美元儲備亦必須作出相應增減，與貨幣基礎的變動百分之百配合。
mt_raw: Hong Kong’s monetary policy aims to maintain monetary stability by ensuring the stability of the Hong Kong dollar’s exchange rate, keeping the USD/HKD exchange rate within the range of 7.75 to 7.85 HKD to 1 USD. The currency system mainly adopts the Currency Board Arrangement, which requires the foreign exchange reserve holdings of the Exchange Fund in US dollars to support the monetary base at a minimum 100%. Changes in the monetary base must be fully matched by corresponding increases or decreases in US dollar reserves, maintaining a 100% backing ratio.

src_raw: 金管局透過自動利率調節機制及履行兌換保證的堅決承諾來維持港元匯率的穩定。當強方（或弱方）兌換保證被觸發，金管局會應銀行要求，按每美元兌7.75港元向銀行沽出港元、買入美元（或按7.85港元買入港元、沽出美元），使總結餘增加（或減少），令港元利率下跌（或上升），從而促使港元匯率回復到7.75至7.85的兌換範圍。
mt_raw: The HKMA maintains the stability of the HKD exchange rate through an automatic interest rate adjustment mechanism and steadfast commitment to the swap guarantee. When the Strong-side (or Weak-side) Guarantee is triggered, the HKMA will, at banks’ request, sell HKD and buy USD at an exchange rate of 7.75 HKD per USD (or buy HKD and sell USD at 7.85 HKD per USD), causing the total balance to increase (or decrease), which in turn causes the HKD interest rates to fall (or rise), helping the exchange rate to return to the 7.75–7.85 range.

src_raw: 受到本港股市調整、市場預期美國進一步加息，以及在香港銀行同業拆息與倫敦銀行同業拆息的負息差下的套息交易帶動，港元在2022年初轉弱，並在其後的月份一直貼近弱方兌換保證水平。弱方兌換保證於5月至11月期間被觸發41次。在本港股市成交轉旺及年底季節性資金需求的帶動下，港元在11月中開始轉強（圖1）。整體而言，港元外匯市場在2022年全年繼續運作正常。
mt_raw: Driven by adjustments in the local stock market, market expectations of further Fed rate hikes, and carry trades under the negative interest rate differential between Hong Kong interbank rates and London Interbank Offered Rate, the Hong Kong dollar weakened at the start of 2022 and remained near the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking level in subsequent months. The Weak-side Guarantee was triggered 41 times from May to November. Benefiting from active stock trading and seasonal end-of-year capital demand, the HKD started to recover in mid-November (see Figure 1). src_raw: 為應付銀行對外匯基金票據的持續需求，金管局於2022年初增發總值400億港元的外匯基金票據。此外，金管局在2022年5月至11月間按照聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）的設計，應銀行要求於弱方兌換保證匯率水平共買入2,421億港元。總結餘由2021年底的3,775億港元，減少至2022年底的963億港元，反映增發外匯基金票據，以及弱方兌換保證被觸發的影響。與此同時，未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額在年內由11,488億港元，稍增至12,004億港元。因此，總結餘與未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額由2021年底的15,263 億港元，減少至 2022 年底的 12,967 億港元（圖2）。整體貨幣基礎仍然由外匯儲備提供十足支持。
mt_raw: To meet ongoing demand for Exchange Fund Notes by banks, the HKMA issued an additional HK$40 billion of Exchange Fund Notes at the beginning of 2022. Additionally, between May and November 2022, the HKMA, following the design of the Linked Exchange Rate System, bought a total of HK$242.1 billion from banks at the Weak-side Guarantee exchange rate level upon bank requests. The total balance decreased from HK$377.5 billion at the end of 2021 to HK$96.3 billion at the end of 2022, reflecting the issuance of additional Exchange Fund Notes and the triggered Weak-side Guarantee. Meanwhile, the total amount of outstanding Exchange Fund Notes and Bonds increased slightly from HK$1,148.8 billion to HK$1,200.4 billion over the year. Consequently, the total sum of the total balance and the outstanding Notes and Bonds decreased from HK$1,526.3 billion at the end of 2021 to HK$1,296.7 billion at year-end 2022 (see Figure 2). Overall, the monetary base remained fully backed by foreign exchange reserves.

src_raw: 在聯匯制度下，香港銀行同業拆息大致跟隨美元銀行同業拆息的走勢。由於美國在2022年持續加息，香港銀行同業拆息逐步上升（圖3）。全年計，隔夜、1個月及3個月香港銀行同業拆息分別上升318、419及473基點至年底時的3.23厘、4.35厘及4.99厘。
mt_raw: Under the Linked Exchange Rate System, Hong Kong’s interbank interest rates roughly tracked US dollar interbank rates. As the US continued to hike rates in 2022, Hong Kong interbank rates gradually increased (see Figure 3). For the year, the overnight, 1-month, and 3-month Hong Kong interbank rates rose by 318, 419, and 473 basis points respectively, to 3.23%, 4.35%, and 4.99% at year-end.

src_raw: 因應美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍上調，基本利率上調7次，合共4.25個百分點（即425基點），由0.5厘上升至4.75厘（圖3）。在零售層面，隨着美國上調政策利率，多間銀行在9月下旬調高最優惠貸款利率12.5基點，在11月初再調高25基點，以及在12月中再調高25基點。部分銀行亦於年內提高以香港銀行同業拆息為基礎的新批按揭利率上限。整體而言，香港貨幣市場繼續正常運作。貼現窗借貸由2021年的68億港元增至2022年的84億港元。
mt_raw: In response to the US Federal Funds Rate target range increases, the basic interest rate was raised seven times, totaling 4.25 percentage points (425 basis points), from 0.5% to 4.75% (see Figure 3). Retail banks also increased their best lending rates, with some raising the rate by 12.5 basis points in late September, followed by a 25 basis points increase in early November, and another 25 basis points in mid-December. Some banks also increased the caps on newly approved mortgage rates linked to Hong Kong interbank rates during the year. Overall, the Hong Kong monetary market continued to operate normally. Discount Window borrowings increased from HK$6.8 billion in 2021 to HK$8.4 billion in 2022.

src_raw: 接近40年來，聯匯制度一直是香港金融體系的重要支柱，展現強大的應對挑戰的能力。儘管2022年全球金融狀況反覆，港元外匯及貨幣市場維持有序運作，反映聯匯制度穩健有效。政府亦堅決維持聯匯制度。國際貨幣基金組織在《2022年對外部門報告》一再重申香港擁有具透明度的規則、龐大的財政及外匯儲備、穩健的金融規管與監管、靈活的經濟，以及審慎的財政架構，確保聯匯制度具公信力。
mt_raw: For nearly 40 years, the Linked Exchange Rate System has been a key pillar of Hong Kong’s financial system, demonstrating strong resilience against challenges. Despite fluctuations in global financial conditions in 2022, the foreign exchange and monetary markets operated in an orderly manner, reflecting the robust and effective nature of the Linked Exchange Rate System. The government remains firmly committed to maintaining the system. The IMF, in its External Sector Report 2022, reiterated that Hong Kong has transparent rules, substantial fiscal and foreign exchange reserves, prudent financial regulation and supervision, economic flexibility, and a sound fiscal framework, all ensuring the credibility of the system.

src_raw: 為提高貨幣發行局帳目的透明度，自1998年10月起，外匯基金已有部分資產被指定用作支持貨幣基礎。支持比率（即支持資產相對貨幣基礎的比率）於2022年在109.3%至111.0%之間上落，並無觸及上限或下限。該比率於12月31日收報110.1%（圖4）。在聯匯制度下，雖然已指定某些外匯基金資產作為支持組合，但外匯基金的全部資產均可用作支持港元匯率。外匯基金的龐大財政資源，加上香港穩健的銀行體系，為保障香港的貨幣及金融穩定提供強而有力的後盾。
mt_raw: Since October 1998, to enhance transparency of the HKMA’s account, part of the foreign exchange reserves have been designated to support the monetary base. The backing ratio (support assets relative to the monetary base) fluctuated between 109.3% and 111.0% in 2022, without breaching upper or lower bounds. As of December 31, 2022, the ratio stood at 110.1% (see Figure 4). Under the Linked Exchange Rate System, although some foreign exchange reserve assets have been designated to support the currency, all reserves are available to support the HKD exchange rate. With substantial fiscal resources and a stable banking system, Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability are strongly safeguarded.

src_raw: 儘管宏觀環境充滿不確定性及挑戰，加上金融市場異常波動，香港銀行體系於2022年維持穩健。年內金管局亦加強對認可機構信用及市場風險管理的監管。此外，鑑於網絡威脅持續增加及銀行業數碼轉型步伐加快，金管局與認可機構緊密合作，提升認可機構的運作穩健性及網絡防衛能力。
mt_raw: Despite an environment filled with uncertainties and challenges, coupled with extraordinary fluctuations in the financial markets, Hong Kong’s banking system remained resilient in 2022. Throughout the year, the HKMA also strengthened supervision of the credit and market risk management of authorized institutions. Moreover, given the persistent increase in cyber threats and the accelerated digital transformation of the banking industry, the HKMA worked closely with authorized institutions to enhance their operational resilience and cyber defense capabilities.

src_raw: 操守監管方面，金管局加強有關「先買後付」產品的消費者保障，並就物業轉按交易提供多一種支付安排。金管局又與其他監管機構合作，就虛擬資產的可持續發展制定監管架構，精簡投資產品銷售程序，以及推出全新的信託業務監管制度。年內有關個人信貸資料的「多間信貸資料服務機構」模式下的「信貸資料平台」啟用，並推出新的強制性背景查核計劃，以應對「滾動的壞蘋果」現象。此外，面對因疫情而實施的旅遊限制，金管局協助推出便利措施讓客戶重新啟動銀行戶口。
mt_raw: In terms of conduct regulation, the HKMA reinforced consumer protection related to "Buy Now, Pay Later" products and introduced an additional payment arrangement for property refinance transactions. The HKMA also collaborated with other regulators to develop a regulatory framework for the sustainable development of virtual assets, streamlined investment product sales procedures, and implemented a new resolution regime for trust business. During the year, the "Credit Data Platform" under the "multiple Credit Reference Agencies" model for personal credit information was launched, along with the introduction of a new mandatory background checking scheme to address the phenomenon of "rolling bad apples." In response to travel restrictions imposed due to the pandemic, the HKMA supported the rollout of measures to enable customers to reopen their bank accounts.

src_raw: 因應最新的香港洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集風險評估，金管局與銀行透過公私營夥伴合作（包括反訛騙及洗黑錢情報工作組），鞏固香港的打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集生態圈，以及加強應對騙案。此外，金管局亦與策略夥伴合作，以能更充分了解及有效管理日益複雜的地緣政治環境所帶來的風險及不穩定因素。金管局又透過「反洗錢合規科技實驗室」系列進一步推動業界運用數據及科技，並同時加快金管局在反洗錢工作中採用監管科技的步伐。在國際事務方面，金管局積極參與財務行動特別組織的工作。
mt_raw: Regarding the latest Hong Kong Money Laundering and Terrorist Financing Risk Assessment, the HKMA, together with banks, strengthened the ecosystem to combat money laundering and terrorist financing through public-private partnership arrangements (including the Fraud and Money Laundering Intelligence Taskforce) and enhanced their ability to counter fraud. The HKMA also partnered with strategic partners to better understand and manage the risks and destabilizing factors arising from the increasingly complex geopolitical environment. Additionally, the HKMA further promoted industry use of data and technology through the series of "AML Regtech Labs," accelerating the adoption of regulatory technology in anti-money laundering efforts. On the international front, the HKMA actively participated in FATF’s work.

src_raw: 銀行可能因營運方式，甚或在極端情況下因失序地倒閉而影響銀行體系的穩定。作為監管當局，金融管理專員在保障金融穩定方面擔當重要角色，確保銀行有能力抵禦衝擊及應對危機恢復常態，以最終有助防止出現倒閉。金融管理專員負責對銀行進行審慎監管，以及認可香港的持牌銀行、有限制牌照銀行及接受存款公司（統稱「認可機構」）。
mt_raw: Banks may impact stability due to their operational methods or, in extreme cases, by failing disorderly. As a regulator, the Monetary Authority plays a vital role in safeguarding financial stability by ensuring banks can withstand shocks and recover from crises, ultimately helping to prevent bank failures. The HKMA supervises banks prudently and recognizes licensed banks, restricted license banks, and deposit-taking companies (collectively called “authorized institutions”).

src_raw: 香港的審慎監管制度並非為確保「零風險」而設。作為其中一個處置機制當局，金融管理專員力求確保一旦有認可機構不再可持續經營，能有秩序地處理其倒閉。為此，香港已設立金融機構處置機制，金融管理專員在該機制下為認可機構（以及其他類型機構）的處置機制當局。為落實香港的處置機制，有必要制定處置規則及政策標準、進行處置規劃以排除認可機構處置可行性的障礙，以及建立金管局處置瀕臨倒閉認可機構的運作能力。為有效執行上述工作，金管局採納與國際一致及協調的方法。
mt_raw: Hong Kong’s prudential supervision system is not designed to eliminate all risks. As part of its resolution framework, the HKMA aims to ensure an orderly resolution of authorized institutions that are no longer viable. To this end, a resolution regime has been established, with the HKMA acting as the resolution authority for authorized institutions (and other entities). Developing effective resolution procedures involves crafting resolution standards, conducting resolution planning to eliminate barriers to resolution for authorized institutions, and enhancing the HKMA’s operational capacity to resolve near-insolvency authorized institutions. The HKMA adopts a globally aligned and coordinated approach in executing these tasks.

src_raw: 除了非現場審查工作外，金管局亦對認可機構的各項業務進行定期現場審查。從審慎監管角度而言，信用風險管理為主要監管重點之一。同時，由於銀行運用科技的情況日趨普及，業務操作風險及科技風險管理是另一個監管重點。隨着綠色及可持續銀行業在香港急速發展，金管局亦已進行一輪以氣候風險管理為重點的專題審查。在操守監管方面，金管局對認可機構的證券、投資產品、保險及強制性公積金（強積金）相關業務進行現場審查，並以專題評估作為配合，以審視被評估為屬較高風險的範疇。
mt_raw: Besides off-site reviews, the HKMA carried out regular on-site examinations of authorized institutions’ business operations. From a prudential supervision perspective, credit risk management remained a key focus. As technological usage in banking becomes more prevalent, operational and technology risks management also became a priority. With the rapid development of green and sustainable banking in Hong Kong, the HKMA conducted a thematic review focusing on climate risk management. In terms of conduct regulation, the HKMA performed on-site reviews of authorized institutions’ securities, investment products, insurance, and MPF businesses, complemented by thematic assessments in areas identified as higher risk.

src_raw: 面對主要經濟體進一步收緊貨幣政策導致市場波動加劇，金管局加強監察銀行的市場及流動性風險承擔。金管局進行審查，以檢視認可機構的流動性風險管理是否足夠，並聚焦於分散資金來源及集團內部流動性風險管理的制度及管控措施。此外，金管局亦進行審查，以評估認可機構的市場風險管理架構及財資業務管控措施的成效。

Additionally, the HKMA assessed the effectiveness of authorized institutions’ market risk management frameworks and treasury operations.

src_raw: 「國際金融領袖投資峰會」舉辦成功，吸引來自約120間環球金融機構超過200位國際及區內領袖參加，不僅鞏固香港的國際金融中心地位，更製造正面的漣漪效應。
mt_raw: The HKMA continues to proactively enhance Hong Kong’s competitiveness as an international financial center. In November, the HKMA hosted the "Global Financial Leaders Investment Summit," fulfilling the plan announced by the Financial Secretary in the 2022–23 Budget. The three-day summit gathered top figures from the financial industry to share insights on navigating economic, financial, technological, and geopolitical uncertainties, and on seizing opportunities amid challenges. The event received widespread acclaim, attracting over 200 distinguished guests from about 120 global financial institutions, including many chairmen and CEOs. Representatives included some of the world’s largest banks, securities firms, asset managers, sovereign wealth funds, private equity and venture capital firms, hedge funds, and insurance companies.

src_raw: 在鞏固香港作為全球離岸人民幣業務樞紐方面，多個範疇均取得理想進展，包括優化金管局與中國人民銀行之間現有的貨幣互換協議，以及金管局的人民幣流動資金安排，確保有足夠人民幣流動性，協助進一步推進離岸人民幣產品及市場發展；與中國人民銀行和證券及期貨事務監察委員會聯合宣布開展「互換通」；與證券及期貨事務監察委員會和香港交易及結算所有限公司合作推出雙櫃台莊家機制，推動人民幣計價股票在香港交易；以及金管局推出多年期計劃，進一步優化金融市場基建及發展債務工具中央結算系統成為亞洲區主要的國際中央證券託管平台。受惠於充足的人民幣流動性，並憑藉世界級的市場基建及內地與香港之間各個互聯互通機制，香港已成為內地資金進入國際市場及國際投資者投資於快速增長的內地市場的首選平台。
mt_raw: In strengthening Hong Kong as a major offshore renminbi hub, several areas achieved ideal progress, including optimizing existing currency swap arrangements with the People’s Bank of China (PBOC), and the HKMA’s renminbi liquidity arrangements to ensure sufficient renminbi liquidity, which helps promote the development of offshore renminbi products and markets; jointly announced the launch of "SwapConnect" with PBOC and the Securities and Futures Commission (SFC); collaborated with the SFC and Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing Limited (HKEX) to introduce the dual-counter market-making regime to promote renminbi-denominated stocks trading in Hong Kong; and the HKMA launched a multi-year plan to further optimize financial market infrastructure and develop the Central Moneymarkets Unit (CMU) into Asia’s leading international securities depository platform. Benefiting from ample renminbi liquidity, world-class market infrastructure, and various connect schemes between Mainland China and Hong Kong, Hong Kong has become the preferred platform for Mainland capital inflows into the international markets and international investors investing in the rapidly growing Mainland market.

src_raw: 香港進一步鞏固其作為離岸人民幣樞紐的地位，年內離岸人民幣業務穩健增長。香港在促進內地與國際金融市場之間的資金流方面發揮關鍵作用，香港與內地間的互聯互通機制被公認為國際投資者進入在岸資本市場及內地投資者配置離岸資產的首選渠道。在2022年，債券通「北向通」成交額佔境外投資者在中國銀行間債券市場整體成交額的61%。債券通「南向通」及「跨境理財通」自2021年開通以來一直運作暢順。金管局與中國人民銀行（人民銀行）和證券及期貨事務監察委員會（證監會）聯合宣布開展「互換通」，把香港與內地的金融合作進一步擴展至衍生品市場，並強化了香港作為主要離岸人民幣業務樞紐及風險管理中心的地位。金管局與人民銀行之間現有的貨幣互換協議於7月優化，是加強香港作為離岸人民幣業務樞紐的另一重要里程碑。
mt_raw: Hong Kong is committed to consolidating its role as a global offshore renminbi business hub by enhancing offshore liquidity, strengthening connectivity with Mainland China financial markets, and improving financial market infrastructure. During the year, renminbi-related activities—including bank deposits, trade settlement, payments, and offshore bond issuance—continued to grow steadily. Progress and achievements were made in boosting liquidity, product development, and expanding connect mechanisms. The results of the Bank for International Settlements’ triennial survey of foreign exchange and derivatives markets reaffirm Hong Kong’s leading position as a renminbi FX centre in 2022.

src_raw: 2022年的投資環境異常動盪，多種資產類別的價格同時下挫，不僅打破同時持有股票與債券可產生緩減風險作用的傳統投資智慧，更成為近半世紀以來唯一一次股票、債券及主要非美元貨幣匯兌同時錄得負回報的一年。在如此惡劣的投資環境下，外匯基金在2022年錄得投資回報率負4.5%。與年內大部分多元資產基金蒙受重大虧損的情況相比，外匯基金的表現反映金管局的多元化長期資產配置，以及因應外圍最新局勢變化而作出的防禦性部署及戰略性調整，有效減低市場風暴帶來的衝擊。
mt_raw: The investment environment in 2022 was unusually turbulent, with prices across various asset classes declining simultaneously. This not only broke the traditional investment wisdom that holding both stocks and bonds could provide a mitigating risk effect, but also marked the only year in nearly half a century in which stocks, bonds, and major non-USD currencies’ foreign exchange rates all recorded negative returns. In such a challenging investment environment, the Exchange Fund recorded a -4.5% return in 2022. Compared with the significant losses suffered by most diversified asset funds during the year, the performance of the Exchange Fund reflects the HKMA’s diversified long-term asset allocation, as well as defensive deployments and strategic adjustments made in response to the latest external environment, effectively reducing the impact of market storms.

src_raw: 根據《外匯基金條例》，外匯基金的首要目的是直接或間接影響港元匯價，亦可運用於保持香港貨幣及金融體系穩定健全，藉此保持香港作為國際金融中心的地位。金管局根據財政司司長轉授的權力及轉授權力的條款，就外匯基金的運用及投資管理向財政司司長負責。
mt_raw: According to the Exchange Fund Ordinance, the primary purpose of the Exchange Fund is to directly or indirectly influence the HK dollar’s exchange rate, and it may also be used to maintain the stability and soundness of Hong Kong’s monetary and financial systems, thereby preserving Hong Kong’s status as an international financial centre. The HKMA, under powers delegated by the Financial Secretary and the terms of those delegation powers, is responsible to the Financial Secretary for the utilization and investment management of the Exchange Fund.

src_raw: 外匯基金大致上分成兩個主要組合：支持組合及投資組合。支持組合持有流通性極高的美元資產，按照貨幣發行局制度的規定為貨幣基礎提供十足支持。投資組合主要投資於經濟合作與發展組織成員經濟體的債市及股市，以保障資產的價值及長期購買力。
mt_raw: The Exchange Fund generally consists of two main portfolios: the Support Portfolio and the Investment Portfolio. The Support Portfolio holds highly liquid USD assets, which, under the currency issuance system, fully support the monetary base. The Investment Portfolio primarily invests in bonds and equities of member economies of the Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD), to safeguard asset values and long-term purchasing power.

src_raw: 為能更妥善管理風險及提高中長期回報，金管局以審慎及循序漸進方式將外匯基金的部分資產配置於較多元化的資產類別，包括新興巿場及內地債券與股票、私募股權（包括基建）及房地產。新興巿場及內地債券與股票由投資組合持有，私募股權及房地產投資則由長期增長組合持有。長期增長組合的目標資產配置與其他資產類別的配置，按審慎的風險管理原則及資產組合多元化策略一起制定。
mt_raw: To better manage risks and enhance medium- to long-term returns, the HKMA adopts a prudent and incremental approach, diversifying part of the Exchange Fund’s assets into more asset classes, including emerging markets and Mainland bonds and equities, private equity (including infrastructure investments), and real estate. Emerging markets and Mainland bonds and equities are held within the Investment Portfolio, while private equity and real estate investments are held within the Long-Term Growth Portfolio (LTGP). The target asset allocation of the Long-Term Growth Portfolio and other asset classes are formulated based on prudent risk management principles and diversification strategies.

src_raw: 外匯基金的投資程序分別以策略性資產配置及戰略性資產配置作基礎。策略性資產配置以投資基準方式反映，亦即外匯基金為達到投資目標而可作出的長線資產配置。外匯基金以策略性配置作為指引，透過戰略性的資產配置，以爭取超越基準的回報。因此，實際配置往往會與基準配置（亦即策略性配置）有所偏離，而實際與基準配置之間的差距稱為「戰略性偏離」。財政司司長經諮詢外匯基金諮詢委員會後制定投資基準及循跡誤差限額，金管局獲授權決定戰略性資產配置及定出戰略性偏離的容許範圍。投資組合經理可在戰略性偏離的容許範圍內管理倉盤，從短期市場變化中獲利。
mt_raw: The investment procedures of the Exchange Fund are based on both strategic and tactical asset allocations. Strategic asset allocation is reflected through benchmark investment, representing long-term asset allocation to achieve investment objectives. The HKMA uses strategic allocation as a guide, and through tactical asset allocation, aims to generate returns exceeding the benchmark. In practice, actual allocations often deviate from benchmark (or strategic) allocations, and the difference is called “strategic deviation.” After consulting the Advisory Committee, the Financial Secretary formulates the investment benchmark and tracking error limits, while the HKMA is authorized to set the strategic asset allocation and permissible range of deviation. Portfolio managers can manage positions within the permissible deviation range to profit from short-term market fluctuations.

mt_raw: The HKMA’s Exchange Fund Investment Office is responsible for the investment and related risk management functions of the Exchange Fund. Staff in this office are responsible for directly managing approximately 70% of the Exchange Fund’s investments, including the entire Support Portfolio and sub-portfolio. The internally managed investments include various global fixed income markets and macro risk management strategies implemented via derivatives.

src_raw: 投資環境越趨複雜，風險管理的重要性不言而喻。金管局為內部及外聘投資經理所管理的投資組合均訂下嚴格管控措施及投資指引，並設立嚴謹的風險監察及合規制度。金管局為投資相關活動設有三重防線，以實施有效的風險管理及管治。金管局定期監察主要投資風險類別（包括信用、市場、流動性及業務操作風險），而風險管理程序的設置為外匯基金的策略性規劃及多元化投資提供穩健的框架。
mt_raw: As the investment environment becomes increasingly complex, effective risk management is paramount. The HKMA enforces strict controls and investment guidelines on both internal staff and external managers, and establishes rigorous risk monitoring and compliance systems. The HKMA maintains a three-tiered defense for investment activities, ensuring effective risk management and governance. It regularly monitors key investment risk categories (including credit, market, liquidity, and operational risks), and the risk management framework provides a robust structure for strategic planning and diversified investments of the Exchange Fund.

src_raw: 金管局相信透過適度強調負責任投資及考慮各項投資的可持續長期表現，可更有效達致外匯基金的投資目標，並且減低投資活動涉及的環境、社會及管治(ESG)相關風險。當ESG投資與其他投資項目的經風險調整長期收益相若時，金管局一般會按既定指導性原則優先考慮ESG投資，並已將ESG因素併入外匯基金的公開市場及私募市場的投資管理過程中。有關金管局的負責任投資框架及落實情況，詳見《二零二二年可持續發展報告》之「負責任投資」一章。
mt_raw: The HKMA believes that by appropriately emphasizing responsible investment and considering the sustainable long-term performance of each investment, it can more effectively achieve the Exchange Fund’s investment goals and reduce ESG-related risks involved. When ESG investments are comparable in long-term risk-adjusted returns to other investment options, the HKMA generally prioritizes ESG investments in accordance with established guiding principles. ESG factors are incorporated into the management of both public market and private market investments of the Exchange Fund. Details of the HKMA’s responsible investment framework and implementation are contained in the “2022 Sustainability Report” under the chapter on “Responsible Investment.”

mt_raw: Public inquiry services serve as an effective channel to raise awareness of the HKMA’s main functions and operations. In 2022, a total of 9,952 inquiries were handled, about half of which related to banking consumer matters, banking policies and regulations, banknotes and coins, financial infrastructure, and bond market development. src_raw: 金管局資訊中心設於國際金融中心2期55樓，是向公眾介紹金管局工作及提高公眾對貨幣與銀行業事宜的了解的重要設施。資訊中心分為展覽館及圖書館兩部分。展覽館以互動方式介紹金管局的工作，以及香港貨幣與銀行業的發展；另備資料與展品，供研究香港貨幣、銀行業與金融事務。毗鄰展覽館的圖書館收藏超過26,000冊書籍、期刊及其他刊物，涵蓋香港貨幣、銀行業、金融和中央銀行事務等課題。圖書館亦按照《銀行業條例》第20條規定備存「認可機構及本地代表辦事處紀錄冊」及「認可機構證券業務員工紀錄冊」，供公眾查閱。
mt_raw: Located on the 55th floor of the International Finance Centre Tower 2, the HKMA Information Center is an important facility to introduce the HKMA’s work and enhance public understanding of monetary and banking affairs. The Center comprises an exhibition and a library. The exhibition utilizes interactive displays to illustrate the HKMA’s functions and the development of Hong Kong’s monetary and banking sectors, with data and exhibits for researching Hong Kong’s monetary, banking, and financial affairs. The adjacent library houses over 26,000 books, journals, and other publications on topics such as Hong Kong’s monetary system, banking, finance, and central banking. The library also maintains records of the “Register of authorized institutions and local representative offices” and the “Register of securities staff,” available for public access as required by the Banking Ordinance section 20.

src_raw: 為與社區保持聯繫及增進市民對金管局工作的認識，金管局自1998年起推出公眾教育講座。於2022年，金管局舉行網上講座，吸引2,200多名來自82間中學的師生參加。講座內容涵蓋金管局工作簡介、聯匯制度、香港鈔票、保障個人數碼鎖匙、存款保障計劃及銀行業發展機遇。公眾教育講座至今錄得參加者人數超過 65,000 名。
mt_raw: To maintain connections with the community and raise awareness of the HKMA’s work, the HKMA has organized public education seminars since 1998. In 2022, the HKMA hosted online seminars attended by more than 2,200 teachers and students from 82 secondary schools. Topics covered included the HKMA’s role, the linked exchange rate system, Hong Kong banknotes, protecting personal digital keys, deposit insurance, and banking career opportunities. To date, over 65,000 people have participated in the public education programs.

mt_raw: The HKMA educates and engages the public to promote responsible and informed use of financial services. The HKMA also conducts radio and social media campaigns offering tips on the prudent use of credit cards, personal loans, online shopping, and other payment methods (“Buy Now, Pay Later” schemes).

src_raw: 管理貨幣及銀行體系的風險是金管局最重要的工作之一。風險管理除了體現於策略制定外，亦應用於日常運作層面。金管局的風險管理框架設有兩個高層次委員會，即宏觀監察委員會及風險委員會；兩者均由金管局總裁擔任主席。
mt_raw: Managing risks in the monetary and banking systems is one of the HKMA’s primary responsibilities. Risk management is reflected not only in strategic planning but also in day-to-day operations. The HKMA’s risk management framework includes two top-level committees: the Macroprudential Surveillance Committee and the Risk Committee, both chaired by the HKMA Chief Executive.

src_raw:
宏觀監察委員會的職權範圍如下：
- 識別香港貨幣及金融體系所面對的潛在風險與威脅，並商討可行對策；
- 檢討現行貨幣及金融體系的風險管理措施，識別可能存在的漏洞，並確保措施完善；及
- 鼓勵跨部門分享宏觀監察資訊，從而提高金管局的宏觀監察能力。
mt_raw:
The scope of the Macroprudential Surveillance Committee includes:
- Identifying potential risks and threats to Hong Kong’s monetary and financial systems and discussing feasible countermeasures;
- Reviewing existing risk management measures for the monetary and financial systems, identifying potential vulnerabilities, and ensuring adequacy; and
- Promoting inter-departmental sharing of macro surveillance information to enhance the HKMA’s macro prudential capacity.

src_raw:
風險委員會的職權範圍如下：
- 識別金管局面對的潛在風險及威脅，並制定策略以減輕有關影響；
- 檢討各部門現行的風險管理制度，識別可能存在的漏洞及重大風險，並確保備有適當措施應付有關情況；
- 統一風險評估準則及方法，並就所識別的風險釐定資源管理的優先次序；及
- 鼓勵及加強金管局內部的風險管理文化，推動適當的授權及監控。

src_raw: 金管局設有一套穩健的營運風險管理框架，涵蓋機構層面及部門層面的組織架構風險。機構層面的風險泛指涉及整體機構所面對的中期風險，或需要跨部門共同應對的風險。在執行過程中，各部門需按季檢討及匯報其潛在和新興風險，以及所提出之監控措施和緩解策略，再輔以由上而下的機構風險管理模式，由各部門的管理高層識別影響較廣泛的主要風險及建議緩解措施。有關評估會經由風險委員會定期審議和決定適當的跟進行動。
mt_raw: The HKMA maintains a robust operational risk management framework covering organizational and departmental risks. Organization-wide risks refer to medium-term risks faced by the entire institution or those requiring cross-departmental responses. During execution, departments review and report on potential and emerging risks quarterly, along with monitoring measures and mitigation strategies, supported by a top-down risk management approach. Senior management identifies major risks with broad impacts and recommends mitigation actions. These assessments are regularly reviewed and followed-up by the Risk Committee to ensure appropriate actions are taken.

src_raw: 內部審核處獨立及客觀評估金管局的管治、風險管理及監控程序是否足夠及具成效。該處職能上向外匯基金諮詢委員會轄下的審核委員會匯報，行政上向金管局總裁匯報。內部審核處採用風險為本的方法進行業務運作及資訊系統審核，涵蓋各重大風險範疇。在2022年，該處就金管局的儲備管理、銀行監管工作、貨幣與金融發展、資訊科技及其他機構職能共進行28項審核。審核結果顯示金管局備有足夠及有效的監控措施，以管理金管局運作所產生的風險。
mt_raw: The Internal Audit Division independently and objectively evaluates whether the governance, risk management, and monitoring procedures of the HKMA are adequate and effective. It reports to the Audit Committee under the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee and administratively to the HKMA Chief Executive. The division adopts a risk-based approach to audit activities and information systems, covering all significant risk areas. In 2022, 28 audits were carried out across areas such as reserve management, banking supervision, monetary and financial development, IT, and other organizational functions. Audit results indicate that the HKMA maintains sufficient and effective controls to manage operational risks.

- Obtaining and reviewing valuation reports for the investment properties held directly by the Group or through associates and joint ventures, and verifying that the fair values are derived from the valuation reports;

src_raw: 我的目標是就整體財務報表是否不存有任何因欺詐或錯誤而導致的重大錯誤陳述取得合理保證，並發出包括我意見的審計師報告。合理保證是高水平的保證，但不能確保按審計署審計準則進行的審計定能發現所存有的任何重大錯誤陳述。錯誤陳述可以由欺詐或錯誤引起，如果合理預期它們個別或滙總起來可能影響財務報表使用者所作出的經濟決定，則會被視作重大錯誤陳述。
mt_raw: My aim is to obtain reasonable assurance about whether the financial statements as a whole are free from material misstatement, whether due to fraud or error, and to issue an auditor’s report that includes my opinion. Reasonable assurance is a high level of assurance but does not guarantee that an audit conducted in accordance with Hong Kong Standards on Auditing will always detect a material misstatement when it exists. Misstatements can arise from fraud or error, and are considered material if, individually or in the aggregate, they could reasonably be expected to influence the economic decisions of users made on the basis of the financial statements.

terms: {'審計師報告': 'auditor’s report', '審計署': 'Audit Commission', '承擔': 'Commitments', '會計政策': 'accounting policies', '金融管理專員': 'Monetary Authority', '集團': 'Group'}
src_raw:
在根據審計署審計準則進行審計的過程中，我會運用專業判斷並秉持專業懷疑態度。我亦會：
- 識別和評估因欺詐或錯誤而導致財務報表存有重大錯誤陳述的風險；設計及執行審計程序以應對這些風險；以及取得充足和適當的審計憑證，作為我意見的基礎。由於欺詐可能涉及串謀、偽造、蓄意遺漏、虛假陳述，或凌駕內部控制的情況，因此未能發現因欺詐而導致重大錯誤陳述的風險，較未能發現因錯誤而導致者為高；
- 了解與審計相關的內部控制，以設計適當的審計程序。然而，此舉並非旨在對集團內部控制的有效性發表意見；
- 評價金融管理專員所採用的會計政策是否恰當，以及其作出的會計估計和相關資料披露是否合理；
- 判定金融管理專員以持續經營作為會計基礎的做法是否恰當，並根據所得的審計憑證，判定是否存在與事件或情況有關，而且可能對集團持續經營的能力構成重大疑慮的重大不確定性。如果我認為存在重大不確定性，則有必要在審計師報告中請使用者留意財務報表中的相關資料披露。假若所披露的相關資料不足，我便須發出非無保留意見的審計師報告。我的結論是基於截至審計師報告日止所取得的審計憑證。然而，未來事件或情況可能導致集團不能繼續持續經營；
- 評價財務報表的整體列報方式、結構和內容，包括披露資料，以及財務報表是否中肯反映交易和事項；及
- 就集團中實體或業務活動的財務資料獲取充足和適當的審計憑證，以對財務報表發表意見。我負責指導、監督和執行集團審計。我對我的審計意見承擔全部責任。

mt_raw: From the communication with the Audit Committee of the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, I will determine which matters, in my judgment, are most important in the audit of the current year’s financial statements, and they will be characterized as key audit matters. I will describe these in the auditor’s report unless law or regulation prohibits disclosure of a matter, or in extremely rare cases, I decide not to communicate the matter in the report because the negative consequences outweigh the public interest in disclosure.
